name: Disco Droids
author: Poki
description: Get ready for some combo-chaining action in Disco Droids! In this shooting game, there are more than 50 levels packed with funky explosive action, where you can shoot your way through a series of challenges. With a limited amount of bullets you have to take a strategic approach as you can bounce bullets off the walls to reach droids that think they've hidden from you. What's more, you can also use your environment to your advantage, as you can break robots by launching environmental objects into them (or having other robots explode nearby)! For the completionists, there are many weapons to experiment with and different skins to unlock. Can you destroy the droids and dominate the disco domain? How do I play Disco Droids? Aim with the mouse and click to shoot! Who created Disco Droids? Disco Droids is created by Dedra Games. Play their other games on Poki: Fantasy Merger , OvO Classic , OvO Dimensions , Quivershot , and Under the Red Sky ! How can I play Disco Droids for free? You can play Disco Droids for free on Poki. Can I play Disco Droids on mobile devices and desktop? Disco Droids can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
